steps.title: Create src/cisterna/adapters/base.py
steps.description: AdapterBase ABC with emit_start/emit_end/emit_error methods, ALLOWED_NAMES guard, and _swallow_name_error. Implement BathosAdapter and ContemplexAdapter per spec §3.6, §5.4.

steps.title: Create src/cisterna/adapters/v3_middleware.py
steps.description: CisternaMiddleware(Middleware) for FastMCP v3 per spec §3.7. Async on_call_tool handler with token management and error handling.

steps.title: Create src/cisterna/adapters/v2_decorator.py
steps.description: traced_tool double-decorator per spec §3.8. Wrapper for sync FastMCP v2 tools.

steps.title: Create src/cisterna/probe/capability_probe.py
steps.description: Per-consumer surface selection per spec §5.2. _has_v3_middleware() check and CONSUMER_SURFACE table.

steps.title: Create tests/test_mcp.py
steps.description: AC-MCP test coverage: v3 middleware, v2 decorator, error handling, token management per §8.

steps.title: Create tests/test_namefreeze.py
steps.description: AC-NAMEFREEZE test coverage: AST lint + runtime guards per spec §4.3-4.4.

steps.title: Run full test suite and linter
steps.description: Verify uv run pytest (all) green and uv run ruff check . clean.

steps.title: Commit work atomically
steps.description: git add -A && git commit with descriptive message.

steps.notes: tool() supports bare and parameterised forms; returns fn unchanged
eager imports of tool + clear_registry; lazy wire via __getattr__
added tool + clear_registry to public API and __all__

title: M2-COMPOSE (2141): shim.py + compose.py implementation
summary: Implemented shim.dispatch (E1), is_async, cli_dispatch (TBD-M2-3), compose_mcp_callable (E2/H1/C5), exported from registration.__init__. 27 new tests covering AC-M2-2/3/4/5/6. 107/107 pass, ruff clean.

title: M2-TELEM (2144): telemetry boundary + F1 dual error contract

steps.action: write tests/test_registration_telem.py with 14 ACs covering AC-M2-14, AC-M2-6 boundary, F1 MCP/CLI
implement F1 CLI error handler in wired.py: try/except around cli_dispatch -> stderr + sys.exit(1)
verify 139 tests pass, ruff clean, commit

title: M2-INIT (2147): expose M2 registration surface from cisterna top-level package

steps.step: Edit src/cisterna/__init__.py to export tool, wire, WiredRegistry, CisternaWireError, clear_registry alongside M1 exports; add A1-A7 docstring; lazy __getattr__ for wire/WiredRegistry
Create tests/test_registration_init.py with 15 tests covering AC-M2-1/7/9/12/13 via the public top-level surface
154 tests pass, ruff clean, committed as 99b7fa0

steps.note: No stale M2-REGISTRY stub comments found in wired.py
tests/conftest.py created with SpyAdapter class + spy_adapter fixture; local duplicates removed from wire and telem tests
test_mcp_callable_propagates_exception now retrieves wired callable via server.get_tool() and asserts ValueError propagates
test_cli_callable_writes_message_to_stderr now asserts 'RuntimeError' type name and 'something exploded' message in stderr
All inline 'import time' moved to module-level in test_registration_telem.py
test_annotated_types_schema switched to pydantic.Field(description=...) with pinned exact string assertions; fastmcp.utilities.func_metadata.Doc not available in installed fastmcp
Registry thread-safety note unchanged per spec

title: M2 final-audit follow-ups: F1/F2/F3

steps.action: Inject __signature__/__annotations__ on CLI wrapper in wired.py + add test
Add required[] assertion for defaulted param in AC-M2-5b schema test
Narrow bare except Exception to except SystemExit in CLI stderr test

outcome: 155 tests green, ruff clean, committed as 5087cea

title: Cisterna M3 agent-asset export — buildable design + task DAG
summary: Shape A framed by Shape F: registry-sourced AssetSpec IR (frozen) + pure-emit Emitter ABC + ClaudeEmitter (provenance sha256 stamp) + write_bundle/dry-run + cyclopts CLI + lazy public API. 8 nodes, 3 parallel waves.
acceptance_criteria: AC-M3-3 inspect.signature degrade to params=() + WARN (PM-4)
AC-M3-4 Emitter ABC abstract + emit purity (PM-3)
AC-M3-5 Claude plugin.json + command files + empty-safe (PM-1)
AC-M3-7 write_bundle dry-run writes nothing + real write (PM-1/3)
AC-M3-8 CLI export --import populates registry, empty-registry WARN, returns 0 (PM-2)

decomposition.step: Register backlog children for M3.1a/M3.1b waves

summary: Staff design + adversarial ACCEPT_WITH_NITS. Buildable spec rev1 reconciles golden resolver, built-in surface loop, CI ordering. Parent epic #2597 registered.
M4 W1-W3 shipped: self-manifest, dogfood fixture, minimal_emitter, golden resolver, native tests, export-dogfood CI. 307 tests green.
M12.3: shared _rust_emit refactor, parallel cursor/copilot/antigravity wedges, wire validate_golden + CI, closeout
M12.4: rename rust-parity job blocking, workflow test flip, runbook/docs, epic #2665 closeout; defer matrix rust_parity + default validate flip
